fields.title: [rule-api] Add structured tracing for RuleStore runtime operations
[rule-api] Add structured tracing for RuleStore runtime operations
[rule-api] Add structured tracing for RuleStore runtime operations
fields.validation_summary: Added structured tracing to RuleStore open/init/open_or_init/scan/reindex/slug-index/resolve_id flows. Focused validation passed for open_or_init_bootstraps_manifest_only_local_store and open_or_init_reindexes_legacy_description_body_content. Broader cargo test -p rule-api still reports two unrelated pre-existing target-config parser failures: load_render_target_config_preserves_domain_tree_target_order and load_render_target_config_supports_file_folder_tree_structure.
